raw_consumer_statement: I have a Macys American Express card issued by Citibank , N.A . There is a fraudulent charge for {$28.00} on XX/XX/year> to XXXX that I did not make, nor did I give anyone authorization to make. I attempted to dispute the charge with customer service, but I keep getting a run around. I was originally told that the charge was going to be disputed, along with late fees that were placed on my account. Later I found that the late fees were removed but the charge remained. So I called again 2-3 weeks later and was told the account must be up to date first, which violates the Fair Credit Billing Act. Because of this, a late payment and late fees have been accrued and it was reported to the credit bureaus. I am requesting that the charge be removed and that the late payment be deleted from my credit reports. Ive never made a late payment, and have over an XXXX XXXX XXXX and now this has damaged my credit.
